calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment And Release Of Interpleaded Funds
Off Calendar May-28-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Marilyn Morris, Esq., appearing for Defendant DAVID P. STAPLETON, The Court-Appointed Receiver for NorCal Capital Management, Inc.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) 3066 MARKET STREET, LLC, a California limited liability company.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows: See scanned Judgment in Interpleader action in favor of David P. Stapleton, Court Appointed Receiver and Against 3066 Market Street, LLC, A California Limited Liability Company (Code of Civil Procedure 386)

Court signed Judgment in open court. Court also signed Order directing clerk to pay defendant's counsel from interpled fund.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Discharging Plaintiff Golden West Foreclosure Service, Inc., A California Corporation From Liability, Dismissing Plaintiff From The Action, And Awarding Plaintiff Costs; Attorneys Fees And Costs; And Directing The Clerk Of The Court To Disburse Funds
Off Calendar May-20-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. CHERYL C. ROUSE of Rouse & Bahlert, Tel No. (415) 575-9444 appearing for Plaintiff Golden West Foreclosure Service Inc.;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF GOLDEN WEST FORECLOSURE SERVICE INC's Motion For Order Discharging Plaintiff Golden West Foreclosure Service, Inc., A California Corporation From Liability, Dismissing Plaintiff From The Action, And Awarding Plaintiff Costs; Attorneys Fees And Costs; And Directing The Clerk Of The Court To Disburse Funds is Granted. No opposition filed. AN ORDER DISCHARGING PLAINTIFF, AND AN ORDER DIRECTING PAY FROM INTERPLED FUND BOTH SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-25-2014 Off Calendar
